# Elsevier Journal Manuscript Template (elsarticle)

## {title}

{author_names_affiliations}

{corresponding_author}

---

## Abstract

{abstract_max_300_words}

**Keywords:** {keywords}

---

## 1. Introduction

{introduction_text}

---

## 2. Methods

{methods_text}

---

## 3. Results

{results_text}

---

## 4. Discussion

{discussion_text}

---

## 5. Conclusion

{conclusion_text}

---

## CRediT Author Statement

{credit_statement}

---

## Declaration of Competing Interest

{declaration}

---

## References

{references}
